conversation_quality.criteria: Evaluate the accuracy of statistics analysis, including correct identification of stale, missing, or suboptimal statistics, and appropriate COLLECT STATISTICS recommendations aligned with query workload patterns.
evaluation_steps: Verify the agent correctly identifies stale statistics by comparing collection dates to data modification activity.
Check that missing statistics recommendations are driven by actual query patterns from DBQL.
Assess whether the agent recommends appropriate stat types (single-column, multi-column, sampled, full).
Confirm the agent explains how stale or missing statistics impact optimizer plan choices.

task_completion.criteria: Evaluate whether the agent produces a statistics health report with coverage gaps and generates prioritized COLLECT STATISTICS statements for remediation.
evaluation_steps: Check that the agent queried DBC.StatsV and DBC.ColumnStatsV to assess current statistics coverage.
Verify the agent cross-referenced statistics with DBQL query patterns to identify coverage gaps.
Confirm the agent produced syntactically correct COLLECT STATISTICS statements with appropriate sampling clauses.
Assess whether recommendations are prioritized by query frequency and performance impact.

trajectory_efficiency.criteria: Evaluate whether the agent efficiently assesses statistics health by querying DBC stats views and DBQL in a minimal number of targeted queries.
evaluation_steps: Check that the agent queried DBC.StatsV for current statistics before checking DBQL for usage patterns.
Verify the agent did not re-query the same statistics metadata for tables already analyzed.
Assess whether the agent used targeted database/table filters rather than system-wide statistics scans.
Confirm the agent combined column-level and index-level statistics checks into efficient queries.
